SS2_NEMEXECUTIONER_DESCRIPTION: The Nemesis Executioner takes away the lives of those who are lost in a coup de grace pro what he envisions sicut the greater welfare.\n\n<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > Death doesn't fear itself.
SS2_NEMEXECUTIONER_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, fading into the unknown.
SS2_NEMEXECUTIONER_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic rediit, legacy perdita in aeternum.
SS2_NEMEXECUTIONER_SPECIAL_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsDamage>Slayer.</style> 1500% scythe dash. heal nearby on kill. tene ad augendum distance
SS2_NEMEXECUTIONER_SPECIAL_ALT_DESCRIPTI: fly et buff et duration on kill
